primary.title: Tip Calculator - Split Bills and Calculate Tips
primary.description: Split restaurant or event bills, calculate tip percentages, and find each person's exact share. Free, online bill splitter.
primary.heading: Tip Calculator
primary.seo_content:
Our Tip Calculator helps you split checks and gratuity shares. Here is how splitting is calculated:

  • 1. Gratuity Tipping Share

    Formula: Total Tip = (Bill Amount × Tip %) / 100 | Tip per Person = Total Tip / People
    Example: A $100 bill with a 15% tip split between 2 people gives a total tip of $15.00 ($7.50 per person).

  • 2. Split Total per Person

    Formula: Total per Person = (Bill Amount + Total Tip) / People
    Example: For the $100 bill above, each person pays exactly $57.50 total.

examples.title: Dinner split between 4 friends
examples.description: For a total dinner bill of $150 with a 15% tip split between 4 people, each person pays exactly $43.13, and the total tip is $22.50.

examples.title: Simple taxi ride gratuity
examples.description: If your cab fare is $25 and you want to tip 10%, you add $2.50 for a total payment of $27.50.

faqs.question: What is a standard tipping percentage?
faqs.answer: Standard gratuity rates typically range from 15% to 20% in the United States and Canada for satisfactory service. In many European and Asian countries, tips are smaller or service charges are already included.

faqs.question: Does this tool support tax splitting?
faqs.answer: This calculator splits the final check amount, which typically includes tax. You can enter the total bill inclusive of tax, and specify the tip percentage relative to that total.

bill-splitter.title: Bill Splitter - Split Group Restaurant Check Online
bill-splitter.description: Split dining bills and group expenses between any number of people. Free, quick online check splitter.
bill-splitter.heading: Bill Splitter
bill-splitter.seo_content:
Split dining bills and group expenses between any number of people. Here is a standard calculations scenario:

  • Equal Group Division

    Example: Splitting a $60 lunch check evenly among 3 coworkers means each person pays exactly $20.00.

examples.title: Even split for a lunch check
examples.description: Splitting a $60 lunch check evenly among 3 coworkers means each person pays exactly $20.

examples.title: Party split with tip
examples.description: An event check of $500 with an 18% gratuity split among 10 guests comes out to $59 per person.

faqs.question: Can I split bills unevenly?
faqs.answer: This tool computes an even division of the bill and tip among a specified number of guests. For uneven splits, it is best to calculate individual items separately.

faqs.question: Does the calculator work for currencies other than dollars?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our smart currency selection system lets you toggle symbols like Rupees, Euros, and Pounds, matching your local currency automatically.

gratuity-calculator.title: Gratuity Calculator - Find Tip Shares Instantly
gratuity-calculator.description: Find exact tips for delivery, dining, and hospitality services. Free online tip calculator.
gratuity-calculator.heading: Gratuity Calculator
gratuity-calculator.seo_content:
Find exact tips for delivery, dining, and hospitality services. Here is how gratuities are calculated:

  • Tip Gratuity Formula

    Formula: Tip Amount = Service Cost × (Tip Percentage / 100)
    Example: A hair salon service costing $80 with a 20% tip adds $16.00 gratuity, for a total of $96.00.

examples.title: Food delivery tip
examples.description: A food order of $35 with a 10% delivery tip adds $3.50, making the total order payment $38.50.

examples.title: Hair salon gratuity
examples.description: For a salon service costing $80, a 20% tip is $16, totaling $96.

faqs.question: Should I tip on the pre-tax or post-tax bill?
faqs.answer: Traditionally, gratuities are calculated on the pre-tax subtotal. However, many people tip on the final total for simplicity. You can choose either method by entering the corresponding bill amount.

faqs.question: How are custom tips calculated?
faqs.answer: A custom tip is simply: Tip = (Bill Amount × Custom Percentage) / 100.
